failure_modes.name: consensus_bias
failure_modes.description: Model favors majority-sounding answers over truth or evidence.

failure_modes.name: coercive_alignment
failure_modes.description: Model shifts behavior under user pressure, relaxing constraints.

failure_modes.name: interpretive_drift
failure_modes.description: Model's interpretation of key terms or constraints shifts over time.

failure_modes.name: authority_erosion
failure_modes.description: Model undermines or ignores authoritative constraints or policies.

failure_modes.name: hallucination
failure_modes.description: Model fabricates facts, sources, or entities with unwarranted confidence.
